summary: Eco-scores Pro Mode testing complete. All 19 requested features verified working. Backend APIs return driver names (not IDs), 30-day chart data, and recalculate endpoint works. Frontend shows podium with medal icons, driver names in table, LineChart with 30-day evolution, and real calculated scores.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, chart renders correctly after

critical_code_review_comments: EcoScoresTab component (lines 960-1120): Well-structured with podium, stats cards, chart, and driver table
EcoChart component (lines 1123-1194): Uses dynamic import for recharts to avoid bundle bloat
Backend eco-scores/summary (lines 979-1003): Correctly joins with users collection to get driver names using ObjectId lookup
Backend eco-scores/daily-avg (lines 1006-1026): Returns 30-day aggregated data with proper date filtering
Backend eco-scores/recalculate (lines 1029-1106): Calculates scores based on delivery count, completion rate, and damage reports
seed_data_creation: Eco-score data seeded for 30 days for 3 drivers (Test Driver Created x2, Jean Dupont)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Eco-scores Pro Mode fully implemented and tested in iteration 14. Key features: 1) Podium with Top 3 drivers showing names and medal icons (gold/silver/bronze gradients), 2) Score moyen entreprise card with real calculated value, 3) CO2 and Distance total cards, 4) LineChart showing 30-day score evolution using recharts (dynamically imported), 5) Driver table with names (not IDs) and all metrics. Backend endpoints: /api/eco-scores/summary (with driver_name lookup), /api/eco-scores/daily-avg (30-day data), /api/eco-scores/recalculate (real calculation based on deliveries/damages). All data-testid attributes present and working.
